## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Kevin Mo's potential fit for a client operations role at GrowthX, exploring his background and approach to the position.](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is experiencing rapid growth (40 clients, $6M ARR) and needs to build scalable systems for onboarding, training, and client management](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Kevin has a strong background in early-stage startups and consulting, with experience in building 0-1 systems and scaling teams](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [The role involves cross-functional collaboration to improve SOPs, training, data analytics, and client health management](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [GrowthX is looking to diversify revenue streams and potentially evolve their service offerings over time](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current State and Challenges

  - [Grown from \~20 to 40 clients, $1M to $6M ARR in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Implemented a pod model with managing editors, account managers, and writers](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Key challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [Keeping up with demand and rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [Refining onboarding and training processes](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Improving client health management and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Updating and maintaining SOPs in a fast-changing environment](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Kevin's Background and Approach

  - [Experience scaling startups from 0-10M ARR and building operational infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Led teams at IBM, growing a gen AI community from 20 to 50+ people](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Proposed 90-day onboarding plan:](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Month 1: Understanding the business, making small improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Month 2: Implementing key process improvements, understanding offerings](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [Month 3: Setting up major systems (NPS, SOPs, onboarding programs)](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Future Direction and Role Evolution

  - [Potential for diversifying revenue streams and service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Possibility of evolving into a "service as software" hybrid model](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Exploring ideas like:](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Helping clients build and hire their own growth teams](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Developing workshop/training programs as both a revenue stream and talent pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Role may evolve to support these new initiatives and changing business model](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)

### Key Metrics and Focus Areas

  - [Current focus on pure ARR growth and onboarding speed](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Shifting towards metrics like Net Revenue Retention (NRR)](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Need to develop better understanding of churn rates and customer health](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Opportunities for improving proactive client management and retention strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to circle back with Bridget regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Kevin to email any additional questions not covered in the interview](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue refining the role description and expectations based on evolving business needs](https://fathom.video/share/ersmwuMzmhFXA7mB9WFFy3Dc2_h9Pzz3?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
